meaning: n.流动性,流度adj.流动的,不固定的,可改变的,可另派用场的,流畅的
examples: The plant exudes a sticky fluid.
Surgeons siphoned off fluid from his left lung.
Eating too much salt can cause fluid retention.
The disadvantage is that capsules are easier (and therefore cheaper) to make than hollow, fluid-filled fibres.
Every improvement is likely to make interaction with machines more fluid and even emotional.
